title: Elrendar Fellowship Guild Hall
summary_html: The holdings of the Elrendar Fellowship, nestled along the banks of the river of the same name.

title: Stormwind City
summary_html: Capital of the Alliance, and humanity on Azeroth.

title: Ironforge City
summary_html: The capital of the Bronzebeard dwarves of the Alliance.

title: Silvermoon City
summary_html: The eternal capital of the elves of Quel'Thalas. Once destroyed, it has since been rebuilt to its former glory.

title: Sunwell Plateau
summary_html: The sanctuary holdings of the Sin'dorei, where historic Sunwell rests on the Isle of Quel'Danas.

title: Undercity
summary_html: The recently reclaimed capital of the Forsaken, and once capital of humanity in Lordaeron. Blight still taints its halls, but clean up is ongoing.

title: Light's Hope Chapel
summary_html: One of the chief holdings of the Argent Crusade, and the Order of the Silver Hand.

title: Menethil Harbor
summary_html: One of the Alliance's main ports in the middle half of the continent.

title: Gilneas City
summary_html: The recently reclaimed capital of the worgen, and the historic home of the Gilnean people.

title: Stromgarde City
summary_html: One of the Alliance's reclaimed holdings in the northern half of the continent; it is ruled by Danath Trollbane.

title: Hammerfall
summary_html: A Horde fortification that once served as an internment camp of the orcs after the Second War.

title: Hearthglen
summary_html: One of the chief holdings of the Argent Crusade, and the Order of the Silver Hand.

title: Zul'Aman
summary_html: The seat of the Amani Empire, the perennial enemy of the Quel'dorei and Sin'dorei elves.

title: Zul'Gurub
summary_html: The seat of Gurubashi Empire, or at least what remains of it.

title: Thas'loren
summary_html: An elven destroyer made accessible to the Fellowship to continue its work.

title: Elrendar Fellowship Guild Hall
summary_html: The holdings of the Elrendar Fellowship, nestled along the banks of the river of the same name.

title: Autumnveil Forge
summary_html: The forge and smithy of Haldarin Autumnveil, providing services to the Fellowship.

title: Training Grounds
summary_html: A training grounds, armory, and jail for dangerous persons captured by the Fellowship and held for a short time. Maintained by the Blood Knights, the Fellowship works hand in hand to ensure its effectively utilized.

title: Medical Clinic
summary_html: The medical clinic, maintained by Priestess Kynseria Vel'dinariel and the other healers of the Fellowship and used for all manner of treatments.

title: Relic Vault
summary_html: A relic vault maintained by Blood Knight Tal'theas Sunfeather, where the Fellowship has begun to store many power and dangerous relics and artifacts.

title: Jendral's Gem Shop
summary_html: A gem smithing and jeweler's shop, maintained by the artisan Jendral Rosepath.

title: Lightstrike Apothecary
summary_html: An apothecary's shop maintained by Allithndria Lightstriker, a fellow of the order.

title: Greenhouse & Tinctures
summary_html: A greenhouse and herbalist shop maintained by Lark and Finch.

title: Event Hall
summary_html: A large, multifunctional event hall.

title: Hearth's Home Tavern
summary_html: A large tavern nestled in the woods near the guild hall.

title: Breaktusk Hearth
summary_html: A large tavern nestled in the woods near the guild hall, maintained by Bel'thar Breaktusk.

title: The Stair of Destiny
summary_html: The Outland facing side of the Dark Portal, a massive gateway linking Azeroth to both the Outlands, and Draenor.

title: The Stair of Destiny
summary_html: The Outland facing side of the Dark Portal, a massive gateway linking Azeroth to both the Outlands, and Draenor.

title: Calcydo's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Calcydo.

title: Syrin's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Syrin.

title: Silanna's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Silanna Leybinder.

title: Tulindi's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Tulindi de Coeur-Errant.

title: Venymir's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Venymir Stormwalker.

title: Alen'dris's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Alen'dris Sunblossom.

title: Laelisel's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Laelisel Goldsong.

title: Glor'andal's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Glor'andal Druindar.

title: Jeshacinin's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Jeshacinin Evertrail.

title: Ashadarie's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Ashadarie Dawncrest.

title: Onitheril's Home
summary_html: A home belonging to fellow Onitheril.

title: Portal Gate
summary_html: A portal gate located near one of Quel'Thalas' powerful runestones.
